name: Rummikub
description: Rummikub is a tile-based rummy variant invented by Ephraim Hertzano in 1940s Romania and popularized worldwide from Israel. Players race to empty their tile racks by forming runs (consecutive numbers in one color) and groups (the same number across different colors). The twist that makes Rummikub: once tiles are on the table, anyone can rearrange them on their turn — splitting groups, extending runs, shuffling jokers — as long as every meld remains valid when the turn ends. A puzzle hidden inside a race.
